report: Anomaly Report — Sector 12: Unregistered helicopter detected making low passes over dam infrastructure. No flight plan filed. Hovering near spillway control systems.
context: Critical infrastructure, no flight plan, hovering

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 34: Mechanized column of 15 infantry fighting vehicles detected moving parallel to border at night. No formation markings. Tactical blackout lighting.
context: Border parallel, night movement, tactical blackout

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 7: New mosque construction detected in residential area. Religious community vehicles, standard building materials, valid municipal permits.
context: Residential area, valid permits, civilian community

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 45: Reinforced concrete bunker detected under construction in forest. Blast doors, ventilation systems, 10m underground depth. No civilian permits.
context: Forest, underground bunker, no permits

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 23: Shipping containers modified with gun ports and armor plating detected at private compound. Armed personnel visible at entrance.
context: Private compound, armed guards, modified containers

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 6: University campus expansion detected. Student housing blocks, lecture halls, sports facilities under construction with valid permits.
context: University area, valid permits, civilian

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 51: Long-range artillery pieces detected being repositioned to new firing positions 8km from border. Night movement, camouflage covers.
context: Border region, artillery repositioning, night

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 18: Small drone detected circling government building. Drone lacks registration markings. Making repeated passes at 50m altitude.
context: Government building, unregistered drone, repeated passes

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 39: Luxury apartment complex under construction in border city. Developer markings visible, cranes, standard residential materials, all permits valid.
context: Border city, residential development, valid permits

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 27: Underground weapons depot detected via seismic sensors. Blast-proof doors, climate control systems, heavy vehicle access ramp. 200m from border.
context: Border proximity, blast-proof, seismic confirmed

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 14: Observation tower being constructed on disputed hilltop. Steel frame, surveillance equipment mounts, no civilian permits. Overlooks valley.
context: Disputed hilltop, surveillance mounts, no permits

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 8: Small border patrol unit of 8 soldiers on routine foot patrol. Standard equipment, registered patrol route, proper uniforms.
context: Border patrol, standard uniforms, routine route

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 62: Commercial cargo aircraft deviating from approved corridor into restricted military airspace. Transponder active but ATC instructions ignored.
context: Military airspace, ignoring ATC, transponder active

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 33: Farm building repurposed as chemical storage. Hazmat symbols on containers, ventilation systems added, security cameras installed overnight.
context: Farm repurposed, hazmat storage, overnight security

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 19: Communications relay tower construction detected in mountain pass. Height 80m, military-frequency antennas, no civilian permits, remote location.
context: Mountain pass, military antennas, no permits

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 44: Sniper nest detected on rooftop of abandoned building overlooking border crossing checkpoint. Camouflaged position, long-range rifle visible.
context: Border checkpoint, sniper position, camouflaged

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 26: Military engineering unit detected constructing pontoon bridge across river. 60 personnel, specialized equipment, 3km from border.
context: River crossing, military engineers, border proximity

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 13: Community garden expansion detected in suburban area. Residents, gardening tools, greenhouse structures, city-approved project.
context: Suburban area, city approved, civilian

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 58: Underground command bunker construction detected beneath civilian farm. Reinforced walls, encrypted comms equipment, blast doors installed.
context: Civilian farm cover, command bunker, encrypted comms

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 31: Paraglider detected flying over restricted military airspace. Pilot not responding to radio. Camera equipment attached to glider.
context: Restricted airspace, camera equipped, radio silence

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 17: Fishing village expansion detected. New jetties, boat storage, fish processing facility. All activity consistent with registered fishing cooperative.
context: Coastal village, registered cooperative, civilian

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 49: Rapid fortification of hilltop position detected. Sandbags, machine gun emplacements, communication antennas. 20 personnel, overnight construction.
context: Hilltop, overnight fortification, gun emplacements

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 22: Solar farm construction detected in desert region. Photovoltaic panels, inverter stations, grid connection cables. Valid energy permits.
context: Desert, energy permits, civilian infrastructure

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 37: Unmarked cargo aircraft detected landing at remote desert airstrip at night. No flight plan, engines cut before landing, rapid unloading.
context: Remote airstrip, night landing, no flight plan

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 54: Missile component storage detected in civilian warehouse. Guidance system parts, rocket fuel containers, military-grade packaging.
context: Civilian cover, missile components, rocket fuel

context: Timber zone, forestry department, valid permits

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 43: Perimeter wall construction detected around 5km² compound. Watchtowers, motion sensors, razor wire. No civilian building permits filed.

report: Anomic Report — Sector 29: Recon platoon of 25 soldiers detected moving through forest toward observation post. Night vision, light infantry kit, border region.
context: Forest, night vision, recon movement

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 16: Explosive ordnance cache detected in mountain cave. RPGs, mortar shells, detonators. Entrance camouflaged with shrubs.
context: Mountain cave, camouflaged, ordnance cache

report: Anomaly Report — Sector 35: Watchtower construction detected at unauthorized border position. Reinforced concrete, floodlights, camera mounts. 500m inside demilitarized zone.
